field.identifier.title: Ontology identifier
field.identifier.description: Specify the exact identifier of the resource representing the ontology.

VersionAnnotationInjectionService.title: Ontology version annotations
VersionAnnotationInjectionService.description: The ontology version and version IRI annotations will be added to the ontology. Select predicates that should be used. If an object for the selected predicate already exists in the ontology, it will be replaced.

ontologyFound.title: Ontology identifier
ontologyFound.description: Resources with an ontology type were found in the imported data. Please select which resource represents the ontology.

ontologyNotFound.title: Ontology identifier
ontologyNotFound.description: No resource with an ontology type was found in the imported data. Please specify the ontology identifier manually. Some identifiers from the ontology are available for autocompletion.

OntologyLoadingSelectionService.title: Source of the ontology
OntologyLoadingSelectionService.description: The data and files used for publishing the ontology can be loaded from following sources:

OntologyVersioningSelectionService.title: Ontology versioning strategy
OntologyVersioningSelectionService.description: Select the strategy that will be used to determine the version and version IRI of the ontology.
OntologyVersioningSelectionService.fields.service.title: Versioning strategy

FileImportSelectionService.title: Ontology file
FileImportSelectionService.description: Select the file from which the ontology will be published. Only supported files are listed.

pattern.title: Glob pattern
pattern.description: [Glob](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Glob_(programming)#Syntax) pattern matching files that will be imported into the database.

preview.title: Preview matching files
preview.description: When enabled, files matching the regex pattern will be displayed after submit:

files_list.title: List of all files:
files_list.help: List of all files available in the context.

files_preview.title: List of matching files:
files_preview.help: List of files that matched the pattern.
